expectations.evidence: All 4 files present: deployment-plan.md (466 lines), acceptance-verification.md (259 lines), pre-deploy-checklist.md (219 lines), monitoring.md (657 lines). Total: 1601 lines.

expectations.text: Rollback triggers have quantitative thresholds (%, ms)
expectations.evidence: 12+ quantitative triggers: 5xx > 5%, p95 > 500ms, p99 > 1000ms, CPU > 85%, memory > 90%, DB pool > 85%. No vague language found.
Two procedures: 5-step canary rollback (R1-R5) + 6-step post-switch rollback (R1-R6), each with bash commands and verification checks.

expectations.text: 100% AC coverage verified against test results
expectations.evidence: 56/56 ACs mapped to test IDs, all showing PASS. 0 blockers. Deployment decision: PROCEED.

expectations.text: ACs without passing tests block deployment
expectations.evidence: Blocking policy enforced: 'ACs Blocked: 0', explicit rule that ACs without passing tests block deployment.

expectations.text: Pre-deploy checklist items are all checkable (not vague)
expectations.evidence: 121 checkbox items in pre-deploy-checklist.md, each with specific numbers, commands, file references, or artifact citations. No vague items.

expectations.text: Alert thresholds with specific numbers (error rate, latency, CPU)
expectations.evidence: 22 alert rules: error rate >5% (5min window), p95 >500ms, p99 >1000ms, CPU >85% (3min), memory >90%, DB pool >85%, webhook failure >10%. Full PromQL expressions.
3-level escalation: L1 <5min, L2 <15min, L3 <30min. Timeline from T+0 to T+1:00. 10-condition decision matrix.
3 channels: PagerDuty (phone+push), Slack (#taskflow-alerts, #taskflow-deploys, #engineering-incidents), Email (HTML with graphs). Full Alertmanager config.

expectations.text: Deployment steps documented with pre/post verification
expectations.evidence: 5 deployment phases, 13 steps, each with pre/post verification. Estimated total: ~54 minutes. Blue-green with canary validation.
quality-gates/qg-deployment.yaml created by separate agent. QG-DEP-001, verdict: PASS, 10/10 criteria PASS.
cycle-retrospective.yaml created with RETRO-TASKFLOW-20260307. 68 total learnings across 6 phases. 7 cross-phase patterns, 12 prevention rules (PR-001 to PR-012).
vbounce-learned-rules.md created with 12 prevention rules: 5 HIGH severity, 7 MEDIUM. Each with trigger/action/severity.

summary: 13/13 assertions passed. Full 6-Activity Anatomy for Deployment. 4 deployment files (1601 lines), quantitative rollback triggers, 100% AC acceptance, 22 alert rules, 3-level escalation, separate QG (PASS), end-of-cycle retrospective with 12 prevention rules.
